---
title: "theme_marquee"
---

[< Back to Reference](../reference.qmd) | [View source](https://codeberg.org/usrbinr/stwd/src/branch/main/R/stwd.R#L431)

# `theme_marquee()`

Apply Marquee Styling to Common Text Elements

## Usage

```r
theme_marquee()
```

## Value

A ggplot2 theme object.

## Description

A theme addition that enables marquee rendering for title, subtitle,
caption, and legend text. Use after your base theme.

## Examples

```r
## Not run: 
ggplot(...) +
    theme_minimal() +
    theme_marquee()

## End(Not run)
```
